channel.title: GitHub Copilot Bulletin — English / Monthly long / Decision makers
channel.description: Latest GitHub Copilot updates for Decision makers (Monthly long, English)

item.title: Copilot Bulletin Monthly (Long) #1 — March 2026 · Decision-Makers Edition
item.description: This month, GitHub Copilot crossed a threshold from coding assistant to enterprise platform. The launch of GPT-5.4 and the Copilot SDK signal that agentic AI is no longer confined to the IDE — it's becoming programmable infrastructure embedded across the software lifecycle. Meanwhile, 60 million code reviews and expanded enterprise controls demonstrate that organizations are not just experimenting with AI-assisted development — they're operationalizing it at scale. For decision-makers, the question is shifting from whether to adopt Copilot to how deeply to integrate it.
